description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-suite that runs on every push to main and develop branches, excluding docs/, and on pull requests to these branches. Run tests with a matrix of Python versions 3.10, 3.11, 3.12 and databases sqlite3, postgresql, mysql. For each job, install dependencies, initialize evennia, and run tests. For specific matrix combinations, also run tests with coverage and send results to Coveralls. Additionally, build and deploy a Docker image for main and develop branches after tests pass.
